problem id: 6d24205b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10100100 -> 11010010
  10011111 -> 10101111
  01000010 -> 01100001
  10010010 -> 00001001
  00100001 -> 00110000
  10101001 -> 01110100
  10010100 -> 11001010
  10100010 -> 00010001

query: 00100011
predicted answer: 01110001
